objects.name: FreePBX security advisory (AV26–474)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26–474 Date: May 15, 2026 On May 15, 2026, FreePBX published a security advisory to address a critical vulnerability in the following products: FreePBX Security-Reporting userman (FreePBX 16) – versions 16.0.45 and prior FreePBX Security-Reporting userman (FreePBX 17) – versions 17.0.7 and prior The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the web links provided, apply the necessary updates and perform the suggested mitigations.
